query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE suppressed = 0 OR suppressed IS NULL) as active_projects,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE priority = 'hot' AND (suppressed = 0 OR suppressed IS NULL)) as hot_projects,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE priority = 'warm' AND (suppressed = 0 OR suppressed IS NULL)) as warm_projects,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipelineClaims WHERE status != 'closed') as active_pipeline_claims,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userEmailSendLog) as total_emails_sent,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns) as total_campaigns,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users;
